text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way back from an outing with Admire
Vega...
Ayabeee!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, sorry! My twin sisters came running as soon
as they saw you, Ayabe!

text_block_list.name: Ines's Little Sister A
text_block_list.text:
We're on our way to the aquarium! Come with us,
Ayabe!

text_block_list.name: Ines's Little Sister B
text_block_list.text: Please! Please! Pleeease come!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hey, stop that! I told you not to grab onto Ayabe!
choice_data_list: What do you want to do?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
You're asking me? Well, it looks like they won't
let go...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: So, I don't think I really have a choice...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, we all arrive at the aquarium.
choice_data_list: The girls seem really attached to you.
The girls seem really attached to you.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Haha, they are! Actually, the last time they were
together...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Thank goodness! Here you are! Sorry, I looked
away and—

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Oh, Ayabe?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Look, she came. I'll be on my way then.

text_block_list.name: Ines's Little Sister A
text_block_list.text:
See you later, Ayabe! Tell us more about the stars
next time!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Huh? You all were talking about stars?

text_block_list.name: Ines's Little Sister B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, while we were walking around looking for
you, Ayabe brought us here!

text_block_list.name: Ines's Little Sister B
text_block_list.text: She told us you'd come if we waited for you!

text_block_list.name: Ines's Little Sister A
text_block_list.text:
While we were waiting, she told us tons of stuff
about the stars! ♪

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Isn't that interesting?!
choice_data_list: And now they can't get enough of her.

text_block_list.name: Ines's Little Sister A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, hey, Ayabe! How do you read this word? Are
there bugs here?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: It's not a bug. It says "octopus."

text_block_list.name: Ines's Little Sister B
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Come look at this, Ayabe! Quick! The fish
are really pretty colors!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
There's no need to rush. The fish aren't going
anywhere...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
How does the Whale Omelet you were looking
forward to taste? Is it good?

text_block_list.name: Ines's Little Sister A
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! It's super yummy! ♪ Oh, do you want some
too, Ayabe?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Come here first... You've got ketchup around
your mouth.

text_block_list.name: Ines's Little Sister B
text_block_list.text:
The dolphin came over! Whoooa! It jumped so
high!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...Uh oh, standing here might not be the best
idea!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: SPLASH!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Are you okay?

text_block_list.name: Ines's Little Sister A
text_block_list.text: Thanks, Ayabe! Oh no! You got soaked!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Waaah! I'm sorry! Come here—I have a towel you
can use!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for today, Ayabe! The girls both had
so much fun! It's been a while since I've seen them
getting excited like that!

text_block_list.name: Ines's Little Sisters
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for coming, Ayabe! Let's play together
again soon!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Heh.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'm... exhausted.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'm... exhausted.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Sure, but even still...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I mean... I guess it wasn't all that bad.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: They really are...
